name: otel-collector
description: OpenTelemetry collector export-queue (buffer/storage) usage alerts. Metrics are scraped via the Datadog openmetrics check from the collector's :8181/metrics endpoint. The chart uses a STABLE, env-independent openmetrics namespace, so the DD metric prefix is a neutral otel_collector.* (NOT otel_collector_<env>_ns.*); the environment is carried in tags (kube_cluster_name, kube_namespace:otel-collector-{{env}}-ns) and filtered there. Export-failure metrics (otelcol_exporter_send_failed_*) are intentionally NOT covered here: they are only emitted once the collector actually exports telemetry, so they cannot be authored/verified on an idle stack — add them once traffic exists and the names are confirmed live.

datadog.message: [P0] OTel collector exporter {{exporter.name}} send-queue is exhausted (>=99% full) on cluster {{kube_cluster_name.name}}. Telemetry is about to be dropped — the export pipeline is backed up. Investigate the downstream exporter target immediately.

annotations.description: The exporter send-queue is at/near capacity. New spans/metrics/logs will be dropped once full. Check the exporter's downstream endpoint health and collector resourcing.

datadog.message: [P1] OTel collector exporter {{exporter.name}} send-queue is above 90% on cluster {{kube_cluster_name.name}}. The exporter is falling behind its downstream target; drops are imminent if it keeps climbing.

annotations.summary: OTel collector export buffer usage high (P1)
annotations.description: Exporter send-queue usage is above 90%. The collector cannot flush to its downstream as fast as it is filling. Investigate before it reaches the P0 (exhaustion) threshold.

datadog.message: [P2] OTel collector exporter {{exporter.name}} send-queue is above 80% on cluster {{kube_cluster_name.name}}. Monitor the growth trend and downstream throughput.

annotations.summary: OTel collector export buffer usage elevated (P2)
annotations.description: Exporter send-queue usage is above 80%. Recoverable, but watch the trend — sustained growth points to a slow or failing downstream exporter.

datadog.message: [P3] OTel collector exporter {{exporter.name}} send-queue is above 70% on cluster {{kube_cluster_name.name}}. Informational — capacity-planning signal.

annotations.summary: OTel collector export buffer usage warning (P3)
annotations.description: Exporter send-queue usage is above 70%. Informational only — useful for capacity planning and spotting slow downstream trends early.
